name: pi-themes-rose-pine
description: Rosé Pine themes for pi (main, moon, dawn)
readme:
# pi-themes-rose-pine

Rosé Pine theme pack for [pi](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono).

Includes all 3 official variants:

- `rose-pine`
- `rose-pine-moon`
- `rose-pine-dawn`

## Install

From npm:

```bash
pi install npm:pi-themes-rose-pine
```

From local source:

```bash
pi install ./pi-themes-rose-pine
```

## Use

In pi, open `/settings` and select one of:

- `rose-pine`
- `rose-pine-moon`
- `rose-pine-dawn`

Or set directly in settings JSON:

```json
{
  "theme": "rose-pine"
}
```

## Package layout

```text
themes/
  rose-pine.json
  rose-pine-moon.json
  rose-pine-dawn.json
```

Configured in `package.json`:

```json
{
  "pi": {
    "themes": ["./themes"]
  }
}
```

## Publish (maintainers)

```bash
npm login
npm whoami
npm pack --dry-run
npm publish
```

Scoped package publish:

```bash
npm publish --access public
```

Recommended release flow:

```bash
npm version patch   # or minor/major
git push && git push --tags
npm publish
```
